name: Bubba's Beer-Broiled Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein shrimp, leaving tails intact.
2. In a large shallow dish, combine beer and remaining ingredients. Add shrimp and stir gently to coat.
3. Cover and marinate in refrigerator for 2 to 3 hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Drain shrimp, discarding marinade.
5. Thread the neck and tail of each shrimp onto six 14-inch skewers so the shrimp lie flat. Place skewers on a lightly greased rack in a broiler pan.
6. Broil 5 1/2 inches from heat (with electric oven door partially opened) for 3 minutes; turn and broil an additional 1 to 2 minutes or until shrimp turn pink.
